segments.text: And KO off the up throw! Flawless!
segments.original_text: そして上投げ撃墜!抜け目なく資材を掘って!

segments.text: Come on Cola! Will he boldly take this second game?!
segments.original_text: さあコーラ!一気果敢にこのまま2戦目取ってしまうか!

segments.text: Bounce back! Min Min's got this!
segments.original_text: 跳ね返せ!ミェンミェンにはこれがある!

full_text: And KO off the up throw! Flawless! Come on Cola! Will he boldly take this second game?! Bounce back! Min Min's got this!

corrections.rule: character name (面々→ミェンミェン = Min Min)
